items.title: Elon Musk misled Twitter investors, jury finds
items.dek: A San Francisco jury concludes Musk’s claims in 2022 were damaging to a group of Twitter investors.
items.body: A San Francisco jury concludes Musk’s claims in 2022 were damaging to a group of Twitter investors.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: As Islamophobia rises, Australia's Muslims celebrate Eid
items.dek: Recent events abroad and at home have fuelled an ongoing surge of Islamophobia in Australia.
items.body: Recent events abroad and at home have fuelled an ongoing surge of Islamophobia in Australia.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
items.dek: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
items.body: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
items.author: IriLine Desk
